pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade the Spring Boot parent version to 3.3.13 to align with the Java 21 migration.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x does not support Java 21; using it with Java 21 results in runtime failures or incompatibility with modern JDK features.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property to 21 to target the new JDK.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the build targets Java 11, which is incompatible with the intended Java 21 runtime environment and features.

src/main/java/com/boot/practice/demo/Col.general_idea: Replace deprecated Integer constructor with valueOf factory method.
src/main/java/com/boot/practice/demo/Col.why_exists: The Integer(int) constructor is deprecated for removal in newer JDKs, causing deprecation warnings or compile errors if strict deprecation checks are enabled.

src/main/java/com/boot/practice/demo/Col.general_idea: Replace deprecated Paths.get with Path.of static factory method.
src/main/java/com/boot/practice/demo/Col.why_exists: Paths.get is deprecated for removal in newer JDKs, causing deprecation warnings or compile errors if strict deprecation checks are enabled.

src/main/java/com/boot/practice/demo/Col.general_idea: Remove unused import for the deprecated Paths class.
